title: Infinite Anvil
body:
From the creator of Create: Broken Bad and Create: Engineer's Construct

This mod changes the anvil to never damage or break when used. No longer will you need to bring several anvils to your XP farm!

Also allows the player to craft an anvil into a chipped anvil, and a chipped anvil into a damaged anvil. That way, they are still obtainable.

Questions/issues? join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/JzAQPX7kDR)! Shared with my other mods.
